lessons.title: Hello & ABC
lessons.topic: Greetings and the sound of A

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you say when you first meet someone?
questions.hint: It's how you start a conversation.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the same sound as 'ant'?
questions.hint: Think of something red you can eat.

questions.question_text: What helps you fly in the sky?
questions.hint: It's very big and has wings.

items.example: I am saying hello to you.

steps.title: Ben's School Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Ben. This is my teacher. I have an apple. Hello, Teacher!

questions.question: Who is Ben saying hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have' to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: Hi! I'm John. This is my friend Sarah. We have apples to share.

questions.question: What do John and Sarah have?

steps.prompt: Say: Hello, I am a teacher.

questions.question_text: I ___ a student. (Grammar question)
What is the first sound in 'apple'? (Sound recognition)
Which emoji shows 'student'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: A teacher is someone who helps us learn.
What word means saying 'hi' to someone?

lessons.title: Morning & Pets
lessons.topic: Daily Greetings and sounds of B and C

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What does the cat do in the morning?
questions.hint: It's a sound that cats make.

questions.question_text: What color is the bird in the video?
Who says 'Good morning' to the class?
questions.hint: This person is helping everyone learn.

steps.title: My Fun Morning
steps.text: Good morning! I am happy. I have a blue ball. This is my cat. Hello, Cat!

questions.question: Who does he say hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' for things you look at.

steps.audio_text: Good morning! This is my cat. I have a big, blue ball. How are you today?

questions.question_text: I have a ___ in my hand. (Vocabulary question)
Complete: I have a ___. It is soft and furry. (Grammar question)
True or False: 'Good morning' is a greeting. (Reading comprehension question)
Which word begins with the B sound? (Letter sound question)

lessons.title: My Friend
lessons.topic: Identity and sounds of D and E

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: An animal that swims and quacks. What is it?
questions.hint: This animal often has yellow feathers.

questions.question_text: What makes a sound like 'eeee' and can be found bouncing in fields?
What is an animal with big ears and says 'ee-aw'?
questions.hint: It loves carrying things and is often grey.

items.example: I have an egg to eat.

steps.title: My Special Day
steps.text: This is Emma. She is a girl. Emma has a pet dog. The dog is her friend. 'I have an egg for you,' she says.

questions.question: What does Emma have for the dog?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show things you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! I am Emma. This is my cute dog, Duke. Duke has a big, yellow egg.

questions.question: What is the name of Emma's dog?

questions.question_text: What is the missing word? This is my ___. (Vocabulary question)
Point to the word that sounds like 'dog'. (Phonics question)
Is 'This is my egg' correct grammar? (Grammar question)
Who is being talked about? 'This is my friend.' (Reading comprehension question)
Which word starts with the same sound as 'elephant'? (Sound question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal begins with the same sound as 'Alligator'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'a' sound like in 'alligator'.

questions.question_text: Which thing starts with the same sound as 'Banana'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'b' sound like in 'banana'.

questions.question_text: Greet with the word 'Hello'. Find the matching sound.
questions.hint: Listen for the 'h' sound as in 'hello'.

steps.title: Anna's Garden
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. This is my garden. I have flowers and a bird. The bird sings.

questions.question: What does Anna have in her garden?

steps.audio_text: Hello, my name is Ben. I have a new blue bike. It is fast and fun to ride.

questions.question: Is Ben's bike slow or fast?

steps.prompt: Say: I am happy and this is my book.
steps.expected_text: i am happy and this is my book

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
This is a pen. What is 'this'? (Reading comprehension question)
Which word starts with the 'e' sound? (Phonics review question)
